settings.heading: How long will it take to receive my order?
settings.description: Most in-stock items ship within 5–7 business days. Custom or made-to-order pieces may take 4–10 weeks, depending on the design and craftsmanship required. We’ll provide an estimated delivery date at checkout.

settings.heading: Do you offer international shipping?
settings.description: Yes, we ship worldwide! Shipping costs and timelines vary depending on your location. You can calculate shipping charges during checkout.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.description: We accept returns within 14–30 days of delivery (depending on your location), provided the item is in its original condition. Custom and made-to-order pieces are non-refundable.

settings.heading: How do I care for wooden furniture?
settings.description: Dust regularly with a soft cloth, avoid direct sunlight, and use coasters to protect surfaces from heat or moisture. For deeper cleaning, use a gentle wood-specific cleaner.

settings.heading: What materials do you use?
settings.description: We work with high-quality, responsibly sourced woods, metals, and textiles. Many of our pieces are handcrafted from natural and recycled materials.

settings.heading: Can I customize furniture pieces?
settings.description: Definitely! Many of our products can be customized in terms of size, finish, or fabric. Contact us for details on bespoke options.

settings.heading: Find Clarity Before You Order
settings.description: Our design experts are happy to provide recommendations and styling tips.
